characters.appearance: Young woman with a slim build and fair complexion. She has long, dark brown hair. She is wearing large aviator-style sunglasses with a tortoiseshell detail on the top bar.
characters.wardrobe: A light grey, long-sleeved button-up shirt worn over a dark top. She has a delicate gold necklace and a gold ring on her right hand.
characters.demeanor: Enthusiastic, animated, and conversational, using frequent hand gestures.

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: So, how long have you been handling this project? [So, how long have you been handling this project?]
Character A says: And he was like, "So, how long have you been handling this project?" [And he was like, "So, how long have you been handling this project?"] And I was like, "I've been leading this for two months." [And I was like, "I've been leading this for two months."] And then he went as far as to say, "Your communication skills are really impressive." [And then he went as far as to say, "Your communication skills are really impressive."] So I'm sitting in the cab after the meeting, and I'm texting my mom immediately. I kid you not, I was like, "मम्मी, आज तो मज़ा आ गया, client ने मेरी English की तारीफ की!" [Mom, today was amazing, the client praised my English!]
Unknown speaker says: तूने इतनी अच्छी English कब सीखी? [When did you learn such good English?]
Character A says: मैं Supernova app यूज़ कर रही हूँ, literally रोज़ सिर्फ 10 मिनट के लिए। [I've been using the Supernova app, literally for just 10 minutes a day.] And now I can actually speak confidently in real life. खुद पे proud feel हो रहा है, honestly. [Feeling proud of myself, honestly.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes a relatable real-world success story (impressing a client/colleague with fluent English).
- Highlights the emotional payoff of feeling proud and sharing the success with family.
- Introduces Supernova as the practical, low-time-commitment solution (10 minutes a day).
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Client was SHOOK I spoke fluent English 😂
How long have you been handling this?
I've been leading this for two months.
Your communication skills are really impressive.
मम्मी, आज तो मज़ा आ गया
because he said
my English was really impressive.
तूने इतनी अच्छी English कब सीखी?

scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the final brand logo and call to action.
- Encourages immediate app download without promising specific free trials.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova
Download the app and start speaking today.
